indicators.name: Marble flooring
indicators.rationale: Marble flooring provides a smooth surface for stretching and yoga poses.

indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: A large open space allows for a variety of yoga poses without obstruction.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga practice.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The absence of furniture may limit the number of yoga poses that can be performed.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for yoga and stretching due to its open layout and natural lighting, but lacks furniture which could limit pose options.
